evals.prompt: 当前 learn_os 后台 QEMU 已经在跑，帮我通过 QGA 部署 fsstress 并做一个短 smoke。
evals.expected_output: The agent should reuse the running QGA socket, avoid starting a new VM, expose fsstress through /usr/local/bin/fsstress, run a timeout-protected smoke, and report the socket/path/exit-code evidence.

evals.prompt: fsstress 不在 PATH，但我记得 xfstests 已经装过。帮我修好。
evals.expected_output: The agent should check /var/lib/xfstests/ltp/fsstress and /root/xfstests-dev/ltp/fsstress before reinstalling xfstests, then relink and smoke-test.

evals.prompt: 我要在 F2FS mount 上跑 fsstress，不要只在 /tmp 证明工具可用。
evals.expected_output: The agent should first verify the requested target filesystem with findmnt, distinguish tool smoke from F2FS workload evidence, and only report F2FS coverage when the target is really F2FS.
